pickup.name: Stabilized Mercury
pickup.effect: Increases damage of thrown vials by 10

encounters.trigger: Opening the morgue door releases a scent that draws the next entity

pickup.name: Crystalline Sulfur
pickup.effect: Temporarily stuns undead enemies

encounters.trigger: Refining the sulfur triggers the emergency lockdown mechanism

pickup.name: Essence of the Void
pickup.effect: Key to weakening the boss's physical manifestation

encounters.trigger: Placing the essence in the central vat summons the boss

boss.name: The Arch-Alchemist Revenant
boss.victory_condition: Inject the essence into the boss's exposed alchemical heart

level.objective: Escape the sanatorium by purifying the corruption core

encounters.hazard: Flickering surgical lights that drain health

pickup.name: Frozen Vials
pickup.effect: Temporarily imbues flames with cryo-shatter properties

encounters.trigger: Burning the Orderly's body opens the heavy reinforced door to the ward

encounters.hazard: Falling debris that traps the player in a corner

pickup.name: Amulet of Eternal Embers
pickup.effect: Increases spell damage against spectral entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Creeper shatters the glass seal blocking the boiler room

encounters.hazard: Steam vents that cause burning damage to the player

pickup.name: Obsidian Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the mechanism holding the Sanitarium Matriarch in chains

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the central terminal initiates the boss summon sequence

boss.name: Sanitarium Matriarch
boss.victory_condition: Use the Obsidian Key to deactivate the Matriarch's ritual shield before landing the final blow

level.objective: Exorcise the Matriarch and escape the burning facility

pickup.name: Silver Eye Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals spectral hidden passages and weak points

encounters.trigger: Approaching the morgue doors reveals the first shadow entity

pickup.name: Corroded Keycard
pickup.effect: Unlocks the experimental surgical wing gate

encounters.trigger: Collecting the lens disturbs a nearby spirit

pickup.name: Master Override Module
pickup.effect: Disables the central containment seal

encounters.trigger: Opening the gate leads to a blocked boss room corridor

boss.name: The Architect of Pain
boss.victory_condition: Use the module to disable the boss's life support field and deliver the final blow

level.objective: Escape the asylum by destroying the source of the corruption
level.reward: The Silent Step Boots: grants permanent movement speed boost

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to biological matter

encounters.trigger: Opening the main doors reveals the path to the inner transept

pickup.name: Ancient Relic Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the inner sanctum where the entity resides

encounters.trigger: Clearing the swarm triggers the seal on the gate to weaken

pickup.name: Blessed Whetstone
pickup.effect: Sharpens arrows to pierce spectral armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Captain drops the barrier to the high altar

boss.name: The Unbound Revenant
boss.victory_condition: Purify the spectral anchor using the blessed arrow

level.objective: Cleanse the cathedral of the lingering curse to restore silence to the ruins.

pickup.name: Spectral Essence
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with spirit barriers

encounters.trigger: Approaching the altar unlocks the inner gate

pickup.name: Silver Censer
pickup.effect: Repels shadows and marks true targets

encounters.trigger: Defeating the wraith reveals a hidden staircase

pickup.name: Abyssal Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber

encounters.trigger: Opening the sarcophagus awakens the boss

boss.name: High Priest of Shadows
boss.victory_condition: Use the Abyssal Key to banish the priest to the void

level.objective: Purify the mausoleum and defeat the High Priest.
level.reward: The Necromancer's Scepter of Eternal Silence

pickup.name: Bottle of Industrial Solvent
pickup.effect: Increases damage against corrosive-sensitive foes

encounters.trigger: The corpse of the Thrall spills keys to the Meat Locker

pickup.name: Heavy Iron Chain
pickup.effect: Stuns enemies and exposes boss weak point

encounters.trigger: Dismembering the Keeper triggers the alarm to the main Furnace

pickup.name: Ignition Override Switch
pickup.effect: Required to destroy the boss core

encounters.trigger: Activating the switch forces the blast doors open to the Boss Chamber

boss.name: The Butcher of Souls
boss.victory_condition: Use the ignition switch to overload the chamber and execute a finisher

level.objective: Escape the slaughterhouse by killing the Butcher

level.setting: A quiet, overgrown monastery under a perpetual twilight

pickup.name: Aged Incense
pickup.effect: Calms spectral entities

encounters.trigger: Lighting the central brazier reveals a path to the meditation hall.

pickup.name: Sanctified Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main cathedral door

encounters.trigger: Placing the incense on the altar unlocks the seal to the inner sanctuary.

pickup.name: Blessed Seal
pickup.effect: Repels darkness

encounters.trigger: Using the key to open the sanctuary doors awakens the final guardian.

boss.name: Eternal Abbot
boss.victory_condition: Apply the Blessed Seal to the Abbot's robes during a brief moment of vulnerability.

level.objective: Cleanse the monastery of the lingering spirits.
level.reward: The Warden's Tithe, an artifact of infinite calm.

pickup.name: glittering inkwell
pickup.effect: increases spell range

encounters.trigger: defeating the toy reveals a key to the music box stage

pickup.name: velvet bowtie
pickup.effect: grants a temporary shield

encounters.trigger: the bear drops a thread that leads to the clockwork hall

pickup.name: golden music box key
pickup.effect: unlocks the final boss barrier

encounters.trigger: using the key on the central pedestal opens the path to the nightmare nursery

boss.name: the puppet master marionette
boss.victory_condition: force the marionette to self-destruct by inserting the golden music box key into its back port

level.objective: escape the toy box prison by defeating the puppet master

level.setting: A crumbling clockwork factory suspended over a molten abyss

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity of environmental hazards

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scuttler activates the conveyor belt leading to the boiler room

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced steel plating

encounters.trigger: Using the coil clears the debris, allowing the player to reach the forge

pickup.name: Master Keygear
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main pressure valve controller

encounters.trigger: Disabling the automaton exposes the override terminal for the boss chamber

boss.name: High Engineer Brass-Heart
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Keygear to vent the boss's internal pressure chamber

level.objective: Stabilize the factory core by defeating the rouge High Engineer
level.reward: Infinite steam-cell supply and honorary Clockwork Guild status

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone triggers the release of pressurized gas, revealing a hidden passage to the central engine room.

pickup.name: High-Voltage Capacitor
pickup.effect: Disrupts electronic control circuits

encounters.trigger: Short-circuiting the guard causes a power surge that unlocks the vault doors leading to the Boss chamber.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from decaying brass rafters

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the boss's invincible defensive barrier

encounters.trigger: Using the key activates the bridge to the final boss arena.

boss.name: Grand Artificer Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Override Key to deactivate the boss shield before depleting health.

level.objective: Shut down the Foundry's self-destruct mechanism before the core implodes.
level.reward: Ancient Schematics for a Perpetual Energy Engine

pickup.name: Spark-Crystal
pickup.effect: Adds electrical discharge to attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the beetle triggers the activation of the steam pipes leading to the boiler room

pickup.name: Pressure-Valve Wrench

encounters.trigger: Using the wrench on the door releases the pressure locking the boss chamber

pickup.name: Golden Gear-Fragment
pickup.effect: Increases health regeneration

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the automaton causes the main boss door to swing open automatically

boss.name: Grand Clockmaker Golem
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Golden Gear-Fragment into the Golem's heart to stop the whimsical chaos

level.objective: Repair the Greenhouse's core engine to stabilize the whimsical floating clockwork garden
level.reward: The Alchemist's Master Flask of Time Badge and unlimited rare steam-reagents

pickup.name: Valve Wrench
pickup.effect: Allows player to vent steam pipes to stun enemies

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the junction pipe to clear the path forward

pickup.name: Lubricant Canister

encounters.trigger: Opening the main service hatch to access the turbine room

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Master Gear Key into the central console

boss.name: Grand Steam Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Jam the Overseer's internal mechanisms with the Master Gear Key

level.objective: Sabotage the main steam generator to prevent the city's collapse

boss.name: The Great Steam Sentinel
